RAY Metaverse

4956 / 5555

If you are a RAY Token holder, you are entitled to 1 free mint. Mint rights are limited. So hurry! RAY is a mystery boxes project launched on solana, but minted in RAY! Mystery Boxes will be able to be opened 1-2 days post-mint and boxes will include a variety of items.

PRICE FREE
